description: Style NoteLightweight yet loaded with high octane style, this pair of flip flops from converse shows why the brand has a cult following among the youth. Super comfy and styled minimally, this is a summer closet essential.Product Details White and black flip flops with branded rubber thong style straps White textured footbed with tyre tread print in blackFoamy rubber outsole with reverse waffle pattern groovesMaterial and CareRubberWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
